dbxv3ReleaseDatePlatforms.title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 Release Date, Platforms, and Store Status
dbxv3ReleaseDatePlatforms.subtitle: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 is scheduled for 2027 on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Steam, with official store pages already live for wishlisting.
dbxv3ReleaseDatePlatforms.intro: Use this section to confirm the official launch window, supported platforms, developer, publisher, and store status for Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3. The confirmed launch window is 2027 for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Steam.

items.label: Release Window
items.details: Bandai Namco, Steam, PlayStation Store, and the official announcement posts list Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 for 2027.

items.label: Confirmed Platforms
items.value: PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, PC via Steam
items.details: The official game page lists PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and Steam. Steam and console store pages are already live.

items.label: Developer
items.details: The official site lists DIMPS, while Steam and Xbox list Dimps Corporation as the developer of Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3.

items.label: Publisher
items.details: Steam lists Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc.; PlayStation and Xbox US store pages list Bandai Namco Entertainment America Inc.

items.label: Official Genre
items.details: Bandai Namco lists the game as Action / Adventure. Steam also lists Action, Adventure, and RPG for Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3.

items.label: Steam Status
items.details: The Steam page lets players add Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 to their wishlist to receive release notifications.

items.label: PlayStation Status
items.details: The PlayStation Store page lists the release as 2027 and provides an Add to Wishlist option for Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3.

items.label: Xbox Status
items.value: Xbox Series X|S store page live
items.details: The Xbox page lists Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 for Xbox Series X|S, with Bandai Namco Entertainment America as publisher and Dimps Corporation as developer.

dbxv3OfficialNewsTimeline.title: Official Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 News and Trailer Timeline
dbxv3OfficialNewsTimeline.subtitle: Follow the confirmed announcement path from the AGE 1000 project reveal to the Welcome to West City gameplay trailer for Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3.
dbxv3OfficialNewsTimeline.intro: This timeline keeps the major reveal beats for Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 in one place: the first AGE 1000 project announcement, the Dragon Ball Games Battle Hour 2026 unveiling, and the newer gameplay-focused West City trailer.

items.headline: Welcome to West City trailer shows more gameplay
items.summary: Bandai Namco revealed more Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 gameplay, showing West City, the AGE 1000 setting, Bulma, Gamma 1, West City University, the Great Saiyan Squad, original characters Brett, Lilica, ROM, and Tap, plus the Soul Assist and Soul Switch combat systems.

items.headline: Dragon Ball Games Battle Hour 2026 roundup highlights the Xenoverse 3 reveal
items.summary: Bandai Namco's Battle Hour recap confirms Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 as the all-new Dragon Ball game previously teased as AGE 1000, with a 2027 launch on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Steam.

items.headline: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 is officially revealed
items.summary: The announcement confirms the return of the Dragon Ball Xenoverse series after 10 years, with a new Dragon Ball world by Akira Toriyama, the AGE 1000 setting, West City, and the Great Saiyan Squad premise.

items.headline: Dragon Ball Game Project AGE 1000 is announced for 2027
items.summary: Bandai Namco announces a new Dragon Ball game project called AGE 1000 after the Dragon Ball Genkidamatsuri event, describing a brand-new Dragon Ball world and original characters brought to life by Akira Toriyama.

dbxv3Age1000Story.title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 Age 1000 Story Guide
dbxv3Age1000Story.subtitle: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 moves the series into AGE 1000, a future Dragon Ball world centered on West City and a new cast of original characters.
dbxv3Age1000Story.intro: The confirmed Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 story setup places the player in a brand-new Dragon Ball universe where they create their own protagonist, explore West City, and join the Great Saiyan Squad as events begin to unfold.

items.title: AGE 1000
items.description: AGE 1000 is the new Dragon Ball era used for Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3. Official descriptions present it as an unexplored Dragon Ball world and a brand-new future universe.

items.title: West City
items.description: West City is described as a developed and vibrant city where players explore, encounter characters, and uncover new stories. The Welcome to West City trailer also gives a glimpse of life at West City University.

items.title: Great Saiyan Squad
items.description: Players are guided into the ranks of the Great Saiyan Squad and fight alongside allies as the Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 story begins to take shape.

items.title: Created Protagonist
items.description: Players choose the hero they want to become and take their place in the story, continuing the Xenoverse focus on a player-created protagonist in Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3.

items.title: Original Characters
items.description: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 introduces original characters in the new Dragon Ball world. The West City trailer names Brett, Lilica, ROM, and Tap as debuting characters.

items.title: Returning Dragon Ball Characters
items.description: Beloved Dragon Ball characters appear alongside the player's protagonist. The West City trailer specifically introduces Bulma and Gamma 1 in the AGE 1000 setting.

items.title: Akira Toriyama Connection
items.description: Official Bandai Namco and store descriptions state that the new Dragon Ball world and unique original characters of Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 are brought to life by Akira Toriyama, the original author of Dragon Ball.

items.title: Story-Driven RPG Direction
items.description: Bandai Namco describes Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 as an epic story-driven RPG experience with an action-packed journey into the new universe and its cast of characters.

dbxv3GameplayCombat.title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 Gameplay and Combat Guide
dbxv3GameplayCombat.subtitle: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 keeps the series' high-speed action focus while adding Soul Assist and Soul Switch mechanics for ally-powered combat.
dbxv3GameplayCombat.intro: This guide turns the confirmed Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 gameplay details into a simple first-look flow, from creating a protagonist and moving through West City to using Ki attacks, Soul Assist, and Soul Switch in battle.

items.title: Create the hero you want to be
items.description: Official descriptions say players decide the hero they want to become in an unexplored Dragon Ball world. Steam also lists extensive character customization options for Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3.

items.title: Explore West City in AGE 1000
items.description: Players journey through the developed and vibrant West City, encounter characters, and uncover new stories in the AGE 1000 setting of Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3.

items.title: Soar and boost through combat spaces
items.description: Bandai Namco describes players soaring through West City and boosting across the battlefield, keeping the fast movement style tied to Dragon Ball Xenoverse combat.

items.title: Fight with close combat and Ki attacks
items.description: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 features intense battles with energy-based attacks, close-quarters combat, and powerful Ki Attacks against enemies.

items.title: Use Soul Assist with a Dragon Ball ally
items.description: Soul Assist lets players unleash a powerful attack alongside a powerful ally from the Dragon Ball universe in Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3.

items.title: Activate Soul Switch for temporary soul power
items.description: Soul Switch lets players temporarily harness the power of a Dragon Ball character's soul to gain strength and new abilities during Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 combat.

items.title: Try confirmed Soul Switch examples
items.description: The official West City gameplay news names Krillin, Piccolo, Vegeta, Future Trunks, and Tien as example souls tied to the Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 Soul Switch mechanic.

items.title: Follow future system reveals
items.description: Bandai Namco states that more details about this Xenoverse entry will be revealed in the months ahead, making this the base for future Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 combat updates.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3

questions.question: What is Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3?
questions.answer: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 is a story-driven action RPG set in AGE 1000, where you create your own hero, explore West City, join the Great Saiyan Squad, and fight with Soul Assist and Soul Switch combat systems.

questions.question: When is the Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 release date?
questions.answer: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 is scheduled for a 2027 release on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Steam, with store pages already live for wishlisting.

questions.question: Which platforms support Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3?
questions.answer: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 is confirmed for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Steam. Developed by Dimps and published by Bandai Namco Entertainment.

questions.question: What is the Soul Switch system in Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3?
questions.answer: Soul Switch lets your hero temporarily harness the power of a Dragon Ball character's soul during combat. Confirmed example souls include Krillin, Piccolo, Vegeta, Future Trunks, and Tien.

questions.question: What is the AGE 1000 setting in Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3?
questions.answer: AGE 1000 is the new Dragon Ball era for Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3, centered on West City and a cast of original characters like Brett, Lilica, ROM, and Tap, brought to life by Akira Toriyama.

questions.question: Who develops and publishes Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3?
questions.answer: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 is developed by Dimps Corporation and published by Bandai Namco Entertainment, returning the Xenoverse series after ten years.

cta.title: Ready for Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3?
cta.description: Wishlist Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 on Steam, join the player community on Reddit, and stay updated on the 2027 release for PS5, Xbox Series X|S and PC.
